scripts.build:sdk: cd packages/sdk-types && bun run build && cd ../sdk-js && bun run build
scripts.dev:web: bun run build:sdk && bun run dev:web:raw
scripts.dev:app: bun run build:sdk && bun run dev:app:raw
scripts.dev:all: bun run build:sdk && concurrently -n g,c,w,a -c auto "make dev.gateway" "make dev.control" "bun run dev:web:raw" "bun run dev:app:raw"
